documents.name: alpha.txt
documents.text: Alpha is the project codename for the indexing pipeline. The Alpha pipeline ingests PDFs, Markdown, and plain text. It writes chunks to a SQLite database backed by the FTS5 extension for lexical search.

documents.name: beta.txt
documents.text: Beta is the project codename for the retrieval layer. The Beta retriever fuses BM25 scores with dense vector cosine similarity and applies maximum marginal relevance to diversify the result set.

documents.name: gamma.txt
documents.text: Gamma is the project codename for the answer generator. The Gamma generator turns retrieved passages into a cited answer using a configurable language model backend.

queries.question: Which pipeline writes chunks to SQLite?
Which retriever uses maximum marginal relevance?
